offline_showing_saved_data: No connection — showing saved data. Connect to refresh.
location_always_sheet_subtitle: Munawwara Care is built for your safety: your location must remain available at all times, including when the app is in the background. Your group and moderators depend on this.
location_always_sheet_bullet_1: In Settings → Apps → Munawwara Care → Location, choose Always (Android: Allow all the time).
location_always_sheet_bullet_2: Without this, live maps, meetpoints, and group features may be wrong or stop updating.
location_always_sheet_bullet_3: SOS and urgent help need your position even if you are not looking at the app.
location_always_limited_dialog_body: If you do not allow “Always” location, live map sharing, meetpoints, SOS, and what moderators see can fail, freeze, or be inaccurate. You will see this reminder again each time you open the app until location is set to Always.
invite_decline_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to decline? You can ask the group creator to invite you again later.

safety_disclaimer_body: Munawwara Care coordinates your travel group. It is not medical advice, not a medical device, and not a substitute for local emergency services (e.g. 999 / 911). SOS alerts your group moderator, not emergency dispatch.

weather_detail_footer_note: Forecast uses your device's approximate location. Pull to refresh on Home to update.
weather_card_jacket: Cool—jacket or light layers for dawn/dusk.
weather_card_heat_sun: Hot sun—shade umbrella + plenty of water.
weather_detail_error_body: Weather could not load. Pull down on Home to refresh or try again shortly.
weather_reminder_jacket: It's cool for Makkah or Madinah—take a jacket or light layers for early morning and evening.
weather_reminder_hydrate: Peak Hijaz heat—sip water/Zamzam often, seek shade between rituals.
weather_reminder_heat_sun_umbrella: Hot sun in daytime (usual in Makkah summers)—bring an umbrella for shade and plenty of water.
weather_reminder_hot_night_hydrate: Still warm at night—keep drinking water and rest before the next hot day.
weather_reminder_warm_hijaz: Warm day—drink water often; a sun umbrella helps in the open near the Haram.
weather_reminder_mask: Dust or haze—protect your nose/mouth outdoors (sand winds off the desert).
weather_reminder_rain: Rain—take an umbrella or rain cover so you stay dry.
weather_reminder_sun_hijaz: Strong sun near the sacred sites—a cap helps; many use a UV umbrella.
weather_reminder_storm: Sudden thunderstorms happen—take shelter indoors, away from open courtyards.
weather_reminder_default: Hydrate with water plus Zamzam when you can rest between worship.

location_onboarding_desc: This app needs your location so your moderator can assist you and ensure your safety.
location_onboarding_important: Important: Please choose "Allow all the time" when prompted by your system settings.
location_disclosure_body: Munawwara Care needs your location when the app is closed or running in the background. This enables real-time pilgrim tracking on your moderator's map and helps SOS requests reach moderators with your exact position.
device_care_desc: Allow the permissions below so your location can be shared for safety, and calls and alerts work reliably in the background.
device_care_step_battery_desc: Set Munawwara Care to unrestricted / don't optimize battery so the app is not killed after a call.
device_care_step_autostart_desc: Turn on autostart (or auto-launch) for Munawwara Care so it can wake for incoming calls.
device_care_step_notifications_desc: Allow all notification categories and full-screen incoming call alerts if your phone offers them.
device_care_step_lock_screen_desc: Allow Munawwara Care to show the full incoming call screen when your phone is locked, so you can answer without extra steps.
device_care_step_lock_screen_footnote_xi: On Xiaomi / Redmi / POCO: enable Show on lock screen and Full screen notifications for Munawwara Care.
device_care_step_lock_screen_footnote_hu: On Huawei / Honor: allow Munawwara Care to display on the lock screen and show full-screen call alerts.
device_care_step_lock_screen_footnote_op: On Oppo / Realme / OnePlus: allow display on lock screen and full-screen notifications for Munawwara Care.
device_care_step_lock_screen_footnote_vi: On Vivo / iQOO: allow display on lock screen and full-screen notifications for Munawwara Care.
device_care_step_lock_screen_footnote_sa: On Samsung: Settings → Apps → Munawwara Care → Notifications → allow Full screen notifications.
device_care_step_lock_screen_footnote_st: On Android 14+: allow Full screen notifications for Munawwara Care.
device_care_guide_lock_screen_instructio: Turn ON display on lock screen and full-screen call alerts for Munawwara Care.
Turn ON Show on lock screen and Full screen notifications for Munawwara Care.
Turn ON Full screen notifications for Munawwara Care.
device_care_hint_xiaomi: On Xiaomi / Redmi / POCO: Security app → Autostart, and Battery → No restrictions for Munawwara Care.
device_care_hint_huawei: On Huawei / Honor: Phone Manager → App launch → enable manual manage for Munawwara Care, and ignore battery optimization.
device_care_hint_oppo: On Oppo / Realme / OnePlus: Settings → Battery → allow background activity, and enable autostart for Munawwara Care.
device_care_hint_vivo: On Vivo / iQOO: i Manager → Autostart, and Battery → allow high background power consumption.
device_care_hint_standard: Open each step below and allow background activity, battery exemption, and notifications for Munawwara Care.
device_care_hint_samsung: On Samsung: Settings → Battery → Munawwara Care → Unrestricted (or Don't optimize). Also remove the app from Sleeping apps if listed.
device_care_guide_preview_header: What to look for in Settings
device_care_guide_battery_instruction: In the next screen, choose the highlighted option for Munawwara Care.
device_care_guide_autostart_instruction: In the next screen, turn ON autostart for Munawwara Care.
device_care_guide_notifications_instruct: Allow all notifications and full-screen alerts if your phone shows them.

faq_a_general_app: Munawwara Care is your Hajj/Umrah companion app designed to keep you connected with your travel guide (moderator) and ensure your safety throughout the journey.
faq_a_general_offline: The app caches your group information and maps for offline use. However, live features like GPS sharing, messaging, and triggering an SOS require an active internet connection.
faq_q_sos_trigger: How do I trigger the SOS alert?
faq_a_sos_trigger: Go to the Home tab and hold the orange SOS button down for 3 seconds. This will send an immediate warning to your moderator along with your live location.
faq_q_sos_process: What happens after I send an SOS?
faq_a_sos_process: Your moderator is notified instantly. Once they accept your alert, you will see their name and update status on your panel. They can also launch a direct voice call.
faq_q_map_location: Why does the app ask for "Always" location permission?
faq_a_map_location: For your safety, the app tracks your position so moderators can locate you in case you get lost. Background tracking ensures your location remains updated even when your phone screen is locked.
faq_q_map_pilgrims: Can I see other pilgrims in my group on the map?
faq_a_map_pilgrims: No, for privacy and clarity, you can only see your own position, pinned group meeting points (hotels, camps), and the moderator's live beacon when they share it.
faq_q_chat_contact: How do I contact my moderator?
faq_a_chat_contact: Navigate to the Chat tab to send text messages or call your moderator directly using the voice calling icon.
faq_a_chat_calls: Yes, all voice calls are made over the internet (WebRTC) and do not use standard phone minutes. Carrier data charges may apply if you are not on Wi-Fi.
